Petrophysical / Regression Baselines (RMSE_log)

Negative delta_nested_minus_baseline means the nested ML pipeline beats the classical baseline at that operating point.

Structural-Covariate Ablation (nested, RMSE_log delta vs full)

Positive delta_vs_full means dropping the covariate hurt generalization (nested LOWO; full reused from the canonical run). The CSV carries deltas for all metrics. The no_zone rows are the aggregate effect of dropping Zone; see the Per-Zone Error Breakdown for where it concentrates.
